title: Benross 45600 Standard 2 Way Wall Adaptor Socket/Includes 2 USB Slots/Surge Protected / 1 Amp USB Charging Current/Compact & Lightweight Design/UK Plug Sockets
features: 2-WAY PLUG EXTENSION – This 2-way Plug Extension Socket is perfect for providing additional plug sockets in your home, office, or any other space you’re in! Its compact and lightweight design makes it easy to set up when you need extra power sources nearby.

USB PORTS INCLUDED – In addition to the 2 plug sockets, 2 USB ports are also included above the plug sockets, making it ideal for phone chargers, small portable speakers, and other USB-powered accessories. This gives space for a combined total of 4 electrical sources!

SAFE SURGE PROTECTION – Each socket is surge protected, automatically shutting off the power supply in case of a power surge to prevent damage to your electrical devices. The USB sockets deliver a max current of 1 Amp, with the max combined capacity of all sockets being 13 Amps & 250V.

UK PLUG SUITABLE – The 2 plug sockets feature the UK 3-pronged plug design, making it suitable for all plugs within the UK, while also working with UK plug adapters for devices that have non-UK plugs.
BENROSS – Benross manufactures a multitude of electrical appliances. From extension cords and adapters, to heaters and coolers for the home, you can find it all at the Benross store on Amazon.
description: Product Description Benross Wall Extension Sockets Convenient, Lightweight Wall Adaptors Make space for extra devices any time you need them with these handy wall extension sockets! Coming in sizes of 2 or 3 sockets, they're ideal for charging anything from phones to appliances. Each of the sockets features surge protection, which can cut off the power in order to keep your devices safe from damage caused by any sudden power surges. The design of each socket is compact and lightweight, with all sockets weighing less than 120 grams. This means you will easily be able to set them up whenever needed. KEY FEATURES UK Plug Sockets (Type G) Surge Protection Compact Design 250V Max Capacity USB Slots Included (2 Socket Models Only) USB SLOTS INCLUDED* Each of the 2 socket extensions feature 2 additional USB slots to make charging smaller devices easy. These USB slots are NOT included on the 3 socket extensions. UK PLUG SOCKETS These multi-socket extensions are designed for use with Type G plugs, more widely known as the UK plug type, with three triangle-shaped prongs. COMPACT & CONVENIENT All of the sockets are lightweight and compact in size, making them easy to fit to a wall socket. They do not require leads, adding further convenience to their design. 10-Way Extension Lead Tower 16-Inch Standing Fan 5m Extension Lead Cable 2000W Industrial Fan Heater Slimline Corded Telephone Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 204 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,504 4.4 out of 5 stars 132 3.9 out of 5 stars 1,214 4.0 out of 5 stars 595 Price £22.99 £ 22 . 99 — no data £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £32.99 £ 32 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 OTHER BENROSS ELECTRICAL PRODUCTS ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
